versions.version_description: Revised the other version of this song on the site and made some corrections. Also included the chords for the full song.

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: When A Man Loves A Woman

content:
BBmak,Back Here.
Tabbed by Bones,tbones@bradway91.freeserve.co.uk.
Back Here - BBMak
Transcribed by Bones.

[CHORDS]
Em/G - 022033
[ch]C/G[/ch]  - x23033
[tab][ch]D[/ch]    - xx0232
G/D  - 320022[/tab]
[ch]C[/ch]    - x32010
[ch]Am[/ch]   - x02210

[INTRO]
[ch]Em/G[/ch]

[VERSE]
[tab][ch]Em/G[/ch]
Baby set me free[/tab]
[tab][ch]C/G[/ch]
From this misery[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                  [ch]G/D[/ch]
I can't take it no more[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em/G[/ch]
Since you ran away[/tab]
[tab][ch]C/G[/ch]
Nothing's been the same[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                          [ch]G/D[/ch]
Don't know what I'm living for[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]C/G[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]  -  [ch]G[/ch]
Here I am so alone[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]C[/ch]                           [ch]D[/ch]
And there's nothing in this world I can do[/tab]

[CHORUS]
[tab]              [ch]C[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch] - [ch]Em[/ch] 
Until you're back here baby[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                  [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]Em[/ch] 
Miss you want you need you so[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]C[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch] - [ch]Em[/ch]
Until you're back here baby[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]C[/ch]       
There's a feeling inside[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]D[/ch]          [ch]Em[/ch]
I want you to know[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                     [ch]D[/ch]
You are the one and I can't[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]
Let you go [/tab]

[VERSE]
So I told you lies
Even made you cry
Baby I was so wrong
Girl I promise you
Now my love is true
This is where my heart belongs
Coz here I am so alone
And there's nothing in this world I can do

[CHORUS]
Until you're back here baby
Miss you want you need you so
Until you're back here baby
There's a feeling inside
I want you to know
You are the one and I can't
Let you go

[BRIDGE]
[tab]       [ch]Am[/ch]
And I wonder (wonder)[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Em[/ch]
Are you thinking of me[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]D[/ch]
Coz I'm thinking of you[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Am[/ch]
And I wonder (wonder)[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Em[/ch]                     [ch]D[/ch]
Are you ever coming back in my life[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]C/G[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]  -   [ch]G[/ch]
Coz here I am so alone[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]C[/ch]                          [ch]D[/ch]
And there's nothing in this world I can do[/tab]

[CHORUS]
Until you're back here baby
Miss you want you need you so
Until you're back here baby
There's a feeling inside
I want you to know
You are the one and I can't

Until you're back here baby...

[Repeat till fade]
